title: PowerHigh Property, Spel Class
description: Returns the power state for the current robot.
see_also:
MotorsOn

PowerHigh Property Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

  .Reset

  .MotorsOn = True

  .PowerHigh = True

End With

C# Example:

if (!m_spel.PowerHigh)

    m_spel.PowerHigh = true;
examples:
With m_spel .Reset .MotorsOn = True .PowerHigh = True
End With
